title: Generation of stable cell lines via lentiviral transduction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ebbsp","text":"Here, we describe a protocol to generate stable cell lines using a lentivirus system. Please note that necessary safety measures are to be taken in working with lentivirus.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4sfi0","text":"Please note that necessary safety measures must be taken to work with lentivirus.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

We purify plasmids using a QIAGEN Plasmid Maxi kit following the manufacturer’s protocols and ensure sterile reagents are used and mixtures prepared in tissue culture hood to avoid contamination.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}
steps: Grow HEK293T cells to 60-70% confluency in Growth media in a 6-well Petri Dish.

Prepare a transfection mix in a sterile 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube, containing: %s %s lentiviral vector with your gene-of-interest 1500 ng Gag/Pol plasmid 1000 ng VSV-G plasmid 500 ng P3000 reagent (Lipofectamine 3000 kit) 5 µL OptiMem 125 µL
Prepare Lipofectamine 3000 mixture in a sterile 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube, containing: %s %s Lipofectamine 3000 5 µL OptiMem 125 µL
Incubate each mixture (from steps 2 and 3) separately for ~ 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Mix the two suspensions and incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .
Add the mixture drop-wise to the cells from step 1 using a P1000 sterile pipette.
Collect the supernatant from the cells (that now contains the lentiviruses) and pass it through a 0.45 µm syringe filter. If needed, add fresh growth medium and collect this too 24:00:00 later.
Add 2 µL of polybrene (8 mg/ml) to 2 mL of lentivirus infection media from step 8 to HeLa cells seeded in 6-well plate (at 700.000/well) at 60% confluence.
Change media to fresh medium and incubate until confluency. Split three times before cells can leave the viral S2 lab.
Cells can now be passaged and plated for experiments or frozen down for long-term storage in liquid nitrogen. Freezing media : growth media added with 20% FBS and 10% v/v DMSO.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
